narrative:
Dublin City 2 (precinct in Union County) has 1,630 registered voters, with 68.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.1%, a modest Republican lean of 5.3 percentage points.
